sentence: The _____ of the new building took two years.
explanation: CONSTRUCT → construction (add -ion to make a noun)

sentence: She felt great _____ when she won the prize.
explanation: EXCITE → excitement (add -ment to make a noun)

sentence: His _____ made everyone in the room feel sad.
explanation: SAD → sadness (add -ness to make a noun from an adjective)

sentence: The _____ of the problem was very difficult.
explanation: SOLVE → solution (change -ve to -ution to make a noun)

sentence: We need to make a _____ about the holiday.
explanation: DECIDE → decision (change -de to -sion to make a noun)

sentence: The _____ of the team was excellent this season.
explanation: PERFORM → performance (add -ance to make a noun)

sentence: Her _____ at the concert was amazing.
explanation: APPEAR → appearance (add -ance to make a noun)

sentence: The _____ of the new park made everyone happy.
explanation: DEVELOP → development (add -ment to make a noun)

sentence: She showed great _____ during the difficult exam.
explanation: PATIENT → patience (change -t to -ce to make a noun)

sentence: The _____ between the two countries improved.
explanation: RELATE → relation (change -e to -ion to make a noun)

sentence: His _____ to help others is admirable.
explanation: WILLING → willingness (add -ness to make a noun)

sentence: The _____ of the movie was very surprising.
explanation: END → ending (add -ing to make a noun)

sentence: We celebrated the _____ of the project.
explanation: COMPLETE → completion (change -e to -ion to make a noun)

sentence: The _____ of the students improved after the new teacher arrived.
explanation: BEHAVE → behaviour (change -e to -iour to make a noun)

sentence: She expressed her _____ for the beautiful gift.
explanation: GRATEFUL → gratitude (the noun form uses the root GRAT- + -itude)

sentence: The _____ of the new law caused many protests.
explanation: INTRODUCE → introduction (change -ce to -ction to make a noun)

sentence: His _____ to the team was very important.
explanation: CONTRIBUTE → contribution (change -e to -ion to make a noun)

sentence: The _____ of the weather affected our plans.
explanation: MOVE → movement (add -ment to make a noun)

sentence: She felt a deep _____ for her lost pet.
explanation: LONELY → loneliness (change -y to -iness to make a noun)

sentence: The _____ of the children was very loud.
explanation: LAUGH → laughter (add -ter to make a noun)

sentence: We need more _____ about the new rules.
explanation: INFORM → information (add -ation to make a noun)

sentence: The _____ of the old house took many months.
explanation: IMPROVE → improvement (add -ment to make a noun)

sentence: Her _____ was obvious when she heard the good news.
explanation: HAPPY → happiness (change -y to -iness to make a noun)

sentence: The _____ of the new product was a big success.
explanation: ADVERTISE → advertisement (add -ment to make a noun)

sentence: We need to find a _____ to this problem quickly.
explanation: EXPLAIN → explanation (change -ain to -anation to make a noun)
